---
title: "Exploration of Qualitative Responses and Missing Data"
format: html
editor: visual
code-tools: TRUE
code-fold: TRUE
embed-resources: TRUE
params: 
  src_d: "../Code/R"
  data_d: "../Data"
  doc_freq_threshold: 4
---

# setup

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: FALSE

library("conflicted", quietly = TRUE)
library("magrittr", include.only = c("%<>%","%>%"),
        quietly = TRUE)
library("tidyverse", include.only = c() , quietly = TRUE)
library("gt",include.only=c(), quietly = TRUE)
library("broom",include.only=c(), quietly = TRUE)
library("patchwork",include.only=c(), quietly = TRUE)
library("labelled",include.only=c(), quietly = TRUE)
library("ggthemes",include.only=c(), quietly = TRUE)

ggplot2::theme_set( ggthemes::theme_fivethirtyeight())

response_complete.df <- readRDS(file.path(params[["data_d"]], 
                                                     "responses_final_complete_clean.rds"))
```

```{r}
#| label: multiple field check

response_complete.df %<>% 
  dplyr::rowwise() %>%
  dplyr::mutate(n_fields = length(field_multi)) %>%
  dplyr::ungroup() 
```

```{r}
#| label: ferg fig 1 support for and engagement in open science by discipline

scales.v <- c("Positivism", "Inclusivity", "Neutrality")
open_types.v <- c("OA","datashare","replication","prereg")
open_measure.v<- c("behavior","opinion","b_percent_1","b_others_1")

oavars.v<- tidyr::crossing(open_types.v, open_measure.v) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(varname =glue::glue("{x}_{y}",x= open_types.v, y = open_measure.v) ) %>%
  pull(varname)


fig_subset.df <-  
  response_complete.df %>% 
    dplyr::select(`ResponseId`, {{ scales.v }}, {{ oavars.v }} )

colnames(response_complete.df)



```
